name: cut
description: Cut plane for clipping ball visualization. Shows only material on one side of a plane.
syntax: cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (<x>,<y>,<z>) normal (<nx>,<ny>,<nz>)

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Cut type (plane is the standard type)

parameters.name: front
parameters.description: Show material in front of the plane

parameters.name: origin
parameters.description: A point on the cutting plane

examples.command: cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (0,0,0) normal (0,0,1)
cut active on type plane surface on front on back off origin (0.5,0,0) normal (1,0,0)
